title: ItzBuble's Create
description: Vanilla+ modpack with Create and addons! Many QOL and generation mods!
body:
A small create based modpack made for me and my friends. I hope you enjoy theese couple of mods that I handpicked.

**Use 4GB RAM.**

## What to expect?
- Automate everything **The Create Mod** with its many **addons** made by its amazing **communnity!**
- **Explore** the world **enhanced** with a lot of **new structures!**
- **Dont miss out** on the **new content** from the new versions with the **Vanilla Backport Mod!**
- **Decorate** your base with many **Decoration Mods!**
- **Store** your **items** in your **Sophisticated Backpack** or in the **Sophisticated Storage!**
- **And many more!** _(QOL, performance mods)_
